name: COFFEE CUP FUEL STOP #10 / CARIBOU COFFEE

violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -A commercial convection oven is not covered by the current hood system.
Linen storage. — --Clean linen was not stored in a clean, dry location or protected from contamination. -Large bag of linen found stored on the floor of the back room.

General premises. — --Food establishment and all parts of the property in connection with their operation were not kept free from litter. -The back dry-storage room is building up with unorganized clutter.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. #10 cans of cheese sauce stored on the floor in kitchen
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Commercial convection oven in kitchen is not under proper ventilation.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Refrigerator door has tape for repair in food storage ledge.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
